metadata.description: Marketplace for the gdpr-uk plugin — UK GDPR / DPA 2018 / DUAA 2025 compliance toolkit

plugins.name: gdpr-uk
plugins.description: UK GDPR & Data Protection Act 2018 compliance toolkit: code/data-flow compliance review, document drafting from full templates (privacy notices, RoPA, DPIAs, processor agreements, LIAs, TRAs, breach notifications), an end-to-end DSAR response workflow, and citation-rich advisory Q&A — current to the Data (Use and Access) Act 2025.
